description: X++/D365 coding-rule configuration for the linter. Rule LOGIC lives in src/d365fo_agent/linter.py (one check function per id); this file is the ESLint-style CONFIG: which rules are on, their severity, and shared parameters. Edit here to tune policy without touching code.

naming-prefix.description: New custom objects must carry the model/publisher prefix; extension objects must target a prefixed custom model.

label-not-literal.description: User-facing text (Label/HelpText) must be a label reference @File:Id, not a literal string.

field-type-matches-edt.description: A table field's AOT element type must match its EDT/enum base type (no AxTableFieldString for an int64/enum EDT). Uses the index to resolve the EDT base type.

extension-target-exists.description: The object an extension targets must actually exist in the indexed corpus (anti-hallucination).

no-legacy-reference.description: Do not build on artifacts classified legacy-deprecated.

privilege-grant-explicit.description: A privilege that only grants Read may be under-permissioned for create/update/delete operations; confirm the grant matches intent.

data-entity-completeness.description: A public data entity should declare PublicEntityName/PublicCollectionName and non-empty Fields/Keys (not a stub).
